name: Iso11783OPSelectInput
title: Iso11783OPSelectInput
syntax: long Iso11783OPSelectInput( dword ecuHandle, dword objectID, dword select );
description: The function selects an input object. A Select Input command is sent to the Virtual Terminal.

parameters.name: ecuHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the ECU (must be created with Iso11783CreateECU)
